title: cyanthillium vernonioides
intro: Cyanthillium vernonioides, also known as the yellow daisy or fireweed, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyanthillium vernonioides include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, ointments, and capsules.
